items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: The validation of the requirement for anonymous bidding could not be conclusively assessed due to insufficient evidence.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Anonymous bidding (don't see others' bids)', but there is no concrete API read or persisted state check provided in the evidence to confirm this requirement was satisfied. The linked use case outlines the need for anonymous bidding, yet the evidence does not include any checks or results that would demonstrate whether this requirement was met during the saga run. Therefore, the validation is inconclusive as it lacks the necessary evidence to support a definitive conclusion.
